title: BMO companions
description: turns the wolf and its 9 variants into BMO from Adventure time
body:
(REQUIRES OPTIFINE)



Adventure time come on grab your friends, we'll go to very distant lands...

This pack turns the wolves into BMO from adventure time with 9 different variants you can discover in different biomes (just like the vanilla wolves). I also changed the wolf spawn egg to a BMO-like console :)

List of BMOs you can find:



woods wolf: default BMO
pale wolf: king of Ooo BMO
black wolf: rugby player BMO
ashen wolf: christmas sweater BMO
chestnut wolf: weird ahh mask BMO from that one horror mansion episode
spottet wolf: cowboy BMO
striped wolf: detective BMO
rusty wolf: Robin Hood BMO

snowy wolf: cool headphones BMO

Normal BMOs will have a normal straight face, the tamed ones will have a smile on their faces and angry ones will just be angry idk lol
To keep his iconic colors I didn't add any wolf collar colors
